mechanics.excerpt: These subordinate lead: ers were grantea patent of nobility allowing them use title commensurate with their importance The nobility had virtually died out when Michael Cameron_ the first elected ruler of the Terran Hegemony recognized the system $ practica application as means exerting control over humankind $ expanding sphere of influence The ever widening expanse of colonies had clearly grown beyond the capacity of single ruler Or even single dynasty to control directly; as for direct democracy; the expense ad difficulty space travel and the limits communications technology across the vast reaches of colonized space made that system government equally impractical.
